hypothesis: If a GraphSAGE model uses frozen embeddings from pre-trained single-gas FNNs (for Ar and O2) as node features along with gas fractions, then it will predict radial etching rates for Ar/O2 mixtures more accurately and generalize to unseen power/pressure regimes and composition thresholds than monolithic FNNs or generic GNNs because the single-gas embeddings encode transferable plasma-chemistry dependencies.
